Source: git@github.com:keystone-engine/keystone.git
Commit: 0.9.2 tag + cherry picking ADR fix - https://github.com/keystone-engine/keystone/pull/542 + cmake fixes - https://github.com/keystone-engine/keystone/pull/593

Config:

Alter make-share.sh's make line to generate an Xcode project:

cmake -DBUILD_LIBS_ONLY=$BUILD_LIBS_ONLY -DLLVM_BUILD_32_BITS="$LLVM_BUILD_32_BITS" -DCMAKE_OSX_ARCHITECTURES="arm64" -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DBUILD_SHARED_LIBS=ON -DLLVM_TARGETS_TO_BUILD="AArch64" -G "Xcode" ..

cd keystone-0.9.2
mkdir build
cd build
../make-share.sh

Open Xcode project
Go to keystone library target
Change architectures to Standard Architectures
Change deployment target to 11.5
Fix Base SDK.
Modify scheme to use MinSizeRel. Update Archive to use that scheme too.
Archive.

Include headers from include/keystone/
